item.title: NNF grant
item.description: Ole Winther, Professor, Aasa Feragen-Hauberg, Søren Hauberg, Jes Frellsen, Anders Krogh and Wouter Boomsma received a prestigious grant from the Novo Nordisk Foundation (NNF) for collaborative research!

item.title: What is a meaningful representation of protein sequences?
item.description:
arXiv preprint

Nicki Skafte Detlefsen, Søren Hauberg, Wouter Boomsma

item.title: Developing and validating COVID-19 adverse outcome risk prediction models from a bi-national European cohort of 5594 patients

Scientific Reports
